channel.title: Bachat App Referral Code B912026674N - Get Up To Rs.1000 Scratch Card Bonus
channel.itunes:author: Bachat App Savings Guide
channel.itunes:summary: Apply the verified Bachat app referral code B912026674N during signup to earn a guaranteed welcome scratch card worth up to Rs.1000 after your first micro-investment in digital gold.
channel.description: Apply the verified Bachat app referral code B912026674N during signup to earn a guaranteed welcome scratch card worth up to Rs.1000. This guide covers the complete process for first-time users including KYC steps, investment options, and scratch card activation rules.

item.title: Bachat App Referral Code B912026674N - Get Up To Rs.1000 Scratch Card Bonus
item.itunes:author: Bachat App Savings Guide
item.itunes:summary: Apply the working Bachat app referral code B912026674N to earn a welcome scratch card worth up to Rs.1000 after your first digital gold investment.
item.description:
🔥🔥 USE BACHAT APP REFERRAL CODE: B912026674N - Get Up To Rs.1000 Scratch Card Bonus 🔥🔥

The verified working Bachat app referral code is "B912026674N". Before you download another savings app and start filling in your details blindly, stop for one minute. I was looking for a simple way to start saving money in small amounts without dealing with complicated mutual fund platforms. A colleague recommended the Bachat app and shared this exact code. When I entered it during registration and made my first Rs.100 deposit, a scratch card appeared in my rewards section within minutes. I scratched it and received a Rs.200 bonus credited directly to my in-app wallet. Here is the complete guide on how you can claim the same benefit.

  • Active Referral Code: B912026674N
  • Primary Benefit: Guaranteed Welcome Scratch Card
  • Reward Value: Variable cash bonus up to Rs.1000
  • How to Use: Enter B912026674N in the promo code box during sign-up
  • Verification Status: Verified Active and Working Today

What is the Bachat App and Why Should You Care?

Bachat is a micro-savings and digital gold investment app designed specifically for people who want to start saving with tiny amounts. Unlike traditional mutual fund platforms that require minimum investments of Rs.500 or Rs.1000, Bachat lets you start a gold savings plan with as little as Rs.10 per day. The app is particularly popular among college students, young professionals, and anyone who finds it difficult to save large sums at once. Think about your daily spending for a moment. That Rs.30 chai you buy every morning at the office. That Rs.50 auto-rickshaw ride you take because you woke up late. Now imagine if you redirected even Rs.10 to Rs.20 per day into a digital gold savings plan. Over a year, that becomes Rs.3600 to Rs.7200 in actual gold assets. And with the referral code bonus on top, your first investment essentially costs you nothing.

⚠️ Watch Out For: The Activation Window Trap

The biggest mistake new users make is completing the registration and KYC but then waiting too long before making their first investment. The scratch card offer has an activation window, and if you do not make your first deposit within a few days of signing up, the welcome bonus may expire permanently. Also, some users accidentally set up an auto-pay mandate during the SIP setup. If you only want to invest once to test the app, make sure you choose the one-time deposit option instead of a recurring plan. The referral code input box also disappears permanently after your first login, so always enter B912026674N before completing registration.

How to Apply the Bachat App Referral Code (Step-by-Step)

  1. Download the Official App: Open the Google Play Store, search for Bachat, and install the original app. Check the developer name and download count before installing to avoid copycat apps.
  2. Register Your Account: Open the app and register using your active mobile number that can receive OTP for verification.
  3. Enter the Referral Code: During the sign-up process, you will see a field labeled "Referral Code" or "Promo Code". Paste B912026674N exactly as shown. Do not type it manually to avoid character errors.
  4. Complete KYC Verification: Provide your PAN card details and Aadhaar number. The verification is usually instant or takes a few minutes.
  5. Make Your First Investment: This can be as small as Rs.10. Choose a daily gold savings plan or make a one-time deposit. The system does not care about the amount for activating the referral reward.
  6. Scratch Your Card: After your first successful investment, the scratch card automatically appears in your rewards section. Scratch it to reveal your bonus amount (anywhere from Rs.20 to Rs.1000).

Prove the Math - Why Using the Promo Code is Profitable

Many users skip referral bonuses because they think the reward amount is too small to matter. That is a mistake. Here is the actual math from three real scenarios:

  • Scenario 1 (Minimum): You invest Rs.10. Scratch card reveals Rs.20 bonus. Net result: You invested Rs.10 but now have Rs.30 in assets. That is a 200% return on day one.
  • Scenario 2 (Medium): You invest Rs.100. Scratch card reveals Rs.50. Net result: You bought Rs.100 worth of digital gold for only Rs.50 out of pocket. That is a 50% instant discount on your first gold purchase.
  • Scenario 3 (Best Case): You invest Rs.100 and get a Rs.500 or Rs.1000 scratch card. Your account starts with Rs.600 or more. That bonus amount continues to grow as gold prices increase over time.

The pattern is clear. No matter what amount the scratch card reveals, using the Bachat app referral code always makes your first savings experience profitable. Without the code, you get zero bonus and start with only your deposited amount.

Who Should Use This Bachat App Referral Code?

This offer is perfect for anyone who wants to start saving money in small amounts without the complexity of traditional investment platforms:

  • College students with a monthly allowance of Rs.3000 to Rs.5000 who want to build a savings habit early
  • Young professionals whose salary barely covers rent and food but want to begin investing
  • People who receive festival money from relatives and want to invest it safely instead of spending it
  • Anyone who wants to buy gold for a family function but cannot afford to visit a jeweller

Important Rules and Conditions

This promotional offer has strict rules. Ignoring any of them will cost you the scratch card bonus:

  • The code B912026674N works only for brand new accounts. If you already have a Bachat account, even a dormant one, the system will recognize your device or PAN and reject the code.
  • The scratch card appears only after your first successful investment is processed, not immediately after signup.
  • The reward amount is variable and randomly generated. It can be anything from Rs.20 to Rs.1000.
  • The bonus goes into your in-app wallet first, not directly to your bank account. You need to meet the minimum withdrawal threshold before transferring.
  • If you do not make your first investment within the activation window after sign-up, the scratch card offer expires permanently.

Frequently Asked Questions

Does the Bachat app referral code B912026674N work for existing users?
No. This code is valid only for first-time users creating a brand new account on the platform.

When exactly will the scratch card appear in my account?
After your first investment is successfully processed. The system activates the scratch card immediately after your initial deposit is confirmed.

Can the scratch card bonus be withdrawn to a bank account?
Not immediately. The bonus is credited to your in-app wallet and must be used for investments first before meeting the withdrawal threshold.

Is the Bachat app safe and legitimate?
Yes. The app partners with certified gold custodians and uses bank-grade encryption. Your digital gold is backed by real 24K physical gold stored in insured vaults.

What is the minimum investment amount needed to activate the scratch card?
Rs.10. Even the smallest possible deposit triggers the referral reward as long as you entered the promo code during registration.

🔑 Final Reminder: B912026674N is the only verified working Bachat app referral code right now. Download the app from the Play Store, enter the code during signup, and make your first Rs.10 investment to claim your scratch card bonus.
